testcase.name: Contact Form › Form fields are visible and accessible
Contact Form › Submit button shows correct default text
Contact Form › Honeypot field is hidden but present in DOM
Contact Form › Form has required field validation
Contact Form › Email field validates format
Contact Form › Service dropdown has options
Contact Form › No console errors on page load
Critical Navigation Smoke Tests › Mobile toggle functionality
Critical Navigation Smoke Tests › Cross-page consistency
Critical Navigation Smoke Tests › Desktop navigation visibility
Critical Navigation Smoke Tests › Mobile menu links navigate correctly
Critical Navigation Smoke Tests › Keyboard navigation - Escape closes menu
Food-Access Map-View Toggle › Default state: Food Deserts button is active, others are not
Food-Access Map-View Toggle › Default state: Food Deserts info panel visible, others hidden
Food-Access Map-View Toggle › Switching to Food Insecurity activates button and shows info panel
Food-Access Map-View Toggle › Switching to SNAP Retailers activates button and shows info panel
Food-Access Map-View Toggle › Cycling back to Food Deserts restores active state
Food-Access Double Burden Mode Toggle › Default state: Total Affected (treemap) button active, treemap visible
Food-Access Double Burden Mode Toggle › Switching to Rate Comparison shows tiles, hides treemap
Food-Access Double Burden Mode Toggle › Switching back to Total Affected restores treemap
Food-Insecurity County Drill-Down › Default state: back button hidden, state label empty
Food-Insecurity County Drill-Down › County search triggers drill-down: back button appears, state label set
Food-Insecurity County Drill-Down › Back button resets to national view
Executive Summary Dashboard › Page loads successfully
Executive Summary Dashboard › Tab navigation bar is present
Executive Summary Dashboard › Dashboard cards are rendered
Executive Summary Dashboard › Chart containers have non-zero dimensions
Executive Summary Dashboard › Renders correctly at mobile viewport (375px)
Executive Summary Dashboard › No JavaScript errors on page load
Food Insecurity Dashboard › Page loads successfully
Food Insecurity Dashboard › Tab navigation bar is present
Food Insecurity Dashboard › Dashboard cards are rendered
Food Insecurity Dashboard › Chart containers have non-zero dimensions
Food Insecurity Dashboard › Renders correctly at mobile viewport (375px)
Food Insecurity Dashboard › No JavaScript errors on page load

Food Access Dashboard › Tab navigation bar is present
Food Access Dashboard › Dashboard cards are rendered
Food Access Dashboard › Chart containers have non-zero dimensions
Food Access Dashboard › Renders correctly at mobile viewport (375px)
Food Access Dashboard › No JavaScript errors on page load

SNAP Safety Net Dashboard › No JavaScript errors on page load

index page - Gradient Icon System › should load page successfully
index page - Gradient Icon System › should find correct number of icon elements
index page - Gradient Icon System › should hydrate all icons with gradient class
index page - Gradient Icon System › should have accessible content in all icons (SVG or glyph fallback)
index page - Gradient Icon System › should have aria-label on all icons
index page - Gradient Icon System › should have role=img on all icons
index page - Gradient Icon System › should have accessible text in all icons (SVG title or SR text)
index page - Gradient Icon System › should have gradient background on icons
index page - Gradient Icon System › should have proper sizing on icons
index page - Gradient Icon System › should capture full page screenshot at 100% zoom
index page - Gradient Icon System › should capture full page screenshot at 25% zoom

Newsletter Popup › Should NOT appear on non-about pages
Newsletter Popup › Should appear after scrolling on about page
Newsletter Popup › Modal has correct ARIA attributes
Newsletter Popup › Close button dismisses modal
Newsletter Popup › Escape key dismisses modal
Newsletter Popup › Email input and submit button are present
Newsletter Popup › Empty email shows validation error
